title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended capital adequacy norms for Urban Co-operative Banks by allowing a zero percent risk weight for specified ECLGS 5.0 exposures. The amendment acknowledges the reduced credit risk associated with government-backed guarantees.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
